name: paywall-gallery-apps
description: Structured manifest for the public PaywallPro paywall gallery.

fields.app_name: App Store display name in the US storefront.
fields.slug: Stable repository slug generated from the App name.
fields.mrr_usd: Estimated monthly recurring revenue in USD.
fields.category_rank: App Store category ranking where available.
fields.version_release_date: Release date for the captured version.
fields.pricing: Human-readable pricing summary extracted from the captured paywall.
fields.markdown_path: Relative path to the App case page.
fields.paywall_image: Relative path to the compressed WebP screenshot.
fields.paywallpro_url: PaywallPro detail link with GitHub campaign attribution.
